description: The student has recently been given a lecture on protein synthesis. A fellow student named [[PERSONA]], who resonate with the student's cultural background, introduces proteins in a way that feels familiar and personally relevant. This sets up the explanation of protein synthesis in the next scene. Avoid scientific jargon.

The student names one thing they learned: Ask the student about their family or traditions
Ask the student if they still have any q: Ask the student about their family or traditions
Introduce ONE of the following valid lis: Ask the student about their family or traditions
